commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can cap the carryover summary and add regression coverage, while maintainer review still owns the public API and privacy-boundary decision.; Needs attention: No supply-chain issue was found, but the diff still needs attention because archived transcript summaries can become model-visible without a size cap or explicit per-turn request.; Review finding: [P1] Cap carryover summaries be... (sha=193fbcafd17f643cc10681b9bc6d35a4ea2d05bf)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds opt-in reset-family history selectors, a shared reset-family transcript resolver, embedded-agent session-store forwarding, and automatic reset-archive compaction-summary carryover with tests/docs/snapshot updates.

PR surface: Source +546, Tests +1058, Docs +6, Other +8. Total +1618 across 47 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main lacks a family/archive selector and the PR source clearly shows the new carryover transform returning an uncapped archived summary. I did not run a live channel reset flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can cap the carryover summary and add regression coverage, while maintainer review still owns the public API and privacy-boundary decision.

target.title: Add reset family carryover summaries
target.body:
## Behavior or issue addressed

Depends on #90239.

When a session has been reset/rotated, the active transcript can be clean while the previous reset archive still contains the latest compaction summary. The next embedded-agent prompt therefore starts without the carryover context unless the model/tool explicitly asks for family history.

This change reuses the session-family transcript resolver from #90239 and injects the latest reset-archive compaction summary into embedded-agent prompt context before the LLM boundary, but only when the active context does not already contain a compaction summary.

## Fix

- Move the #90239 family/reset transcript target resolver into a shared gateway helper.
- Keep `chat.history(includeFamily)` on the shared resolver.
- Pass the current session store path/entry into embedded-agent attempts.
- Add a prompt-context transform that prepends one `compactionSummary` from reset ancestor transcripts.
- Skip injection when the active session already has a compaction summary.
- Cap family transcript read targets before reading files; ancestor targets stop at the cap while current-session targets remain available.
- Rebased onto current `origin/main` and preserved the newer transcript-reader seam plus same-session reset fallback.

## Exact-Head Real Behavior Proof

**Current head proven:** `7254ee062dffd5aa1d711963682cfd769e4e097e`.

**Behavior or issue addressed:** A reset/rotated logical session should be able to read bounded reset-family history through the shared resolver, keep current reset archive plus current active transcript inside the cap, and inject exactly one reset-ancestor compaction summary before the embedded-agent LLM boundary when the active prompt has no summary.

**Real environment tested:** Local OpenClaw checkout on this PR branch at `/home/clever/.openclaw/workspace/github/openclaw`, using current branch TypeScript modules and temporary on-disk session stores/transcripts under `/tmp/openclaw-family-proof-*`.

**Exact command run after this patch:**

```text
$ git rev-parse HEAD
7254ee062dffd5aa1d711963682cfd769e4e097e

$ node --import tsx --input-type=module <<'TS'
# The script imported these current-branch modules:
# - ./src/gateway/session-history-family.ts
# - ./src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/session-family-carryover.ts
# It created a temporary sessions.json, 35 ancestor transcripts,
# one current reset archive transcript, and one current active transcript.
# It then called resolveSessionFamilyTranscriptReadTargets,
# resolveSessionFamilyCarryoverSummary, installed the prompt transform,
# applied the transform twice, printed the observed result, and removed temp files.
TS
{
  "targetCount": 32,
  "firstTargets": [
    "ancestor-proof-00",
    "ancestor-proof-01",
    "ancestor-proof-02"
  ],
  "lastTargets": [
    "ancestor-proof-29",
    "current-proof-session",
    "current-proof-session"
  ],
  "currentArchivePresent": true,
  "currentActiveLast": true,
  "ancestor00Present": true,
  "ancestor29Present": true,
  "ancestor30Present": false,
  "ancestor34Present": false,
  "carryoverSummary": "Exact-head carryover 29",
  "carryoverTokensBefore": 2029,
  "promptRolesBeforeLlm": [
    "compactionSummary",
    "user"
  ],
  "compactionSummaryCount": 1,
  "idempotentRoles": [
    "compactionSummary",
    "user"
  ]
}
```

**Observed result after fix:**

- The shared resolver returned 32 targets and kept both current reset archive and current active transcript inside the cap.
- The current active transcript was ordered last for final history trimming.
- Ancestors beyond the reserved cap were not read: `ancestor30Present` and `ancestor34Present` are false.
- Carryover skipped the current active compaction row and selected the latest ancestor inside the capped family window, `Exact-head carryover 29`.
- The embedded prompt transform injected exactly one `compactionSummary` before the model boundary and remained idempotent on a second pass.

**Validation on current head:**

```text
$ CI=true node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts src/agents/tools/embedded-gateway-stub.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/session-family-carryover.test.ts
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  86 passed (86)
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  18 passed (18)

$ CI=true node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run test/scripts/kitchen-sink-rpc-walk.test.ts test/scripts/update-clawtributors.test.ts
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  102 passed (102)

$ CI=true node --import tsx scripts/generate-prompt-snapshots.ts --check
Prompt snapshots are current (7 files).

$ CI=true node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.src.json
# passed

$ git diff --check
# no output
```

**What was not tested:** Full live Telegram/Slack/Discord end-to-end reset turn was not run locally; the proof exercises the real resolver and embedded carryover path against on-disk OpenClaw-like session artifacts.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior or issue addressed:** When the active post-reset session has no compaction summary but reset-family transcripts have persisted compaction rows, the embedded-agent prompt context should carry the active reset-family summary forward exactly once before the LLM boundary without reading unowned reset archives or every retained lineage target.

**Real environment tested:** Local upstream checkout at `/home/clever/.openclaw/workspace/github/openclaw` on branch `pr-90259`, current head `cda0a9633c`, using real TypeScript source modules and temporary on-disk OpenClaw-like session stores/transcripts under `/tmp`.

**Exact steps or command run after the patch:**

1. Created a temporary on-disk session store where `main` points at a clean active session and `usageFamilySessionIds` contains 35 ancestor sessions plus the current session.
2. Wrote real JSONL transcript files with compaction rows for each ancestor and an active-current compaction row that must be skipped by carryover.
3. Invoked `resolveSessionFamilyTranscriptReadTargets`, `resolveSessionFamilyCarryoverSummary`, and `installSessionFamilyCarryoverContextTransform` from the branch source with `node --import tsx`, outside Vitest.
4. Applied the transform to the prompt messages that would be handed to the model boundary and applied it a second time to prove idempotence.
5. Re-ran focused Gateway/carryover tests plus prompt snapshots, TypeScript, and whitespace checks after rebasing onto current main.

**Evidence after fix:**

Terminal capture from current head:

```text
$ node --import tsx --input-type=module <<'SMOKE'
# smoke creates /tmp/openclaw-family-proof-* transcripts, resolves carryover,
# installs the prompt transform, and applies it to pre-LLM messages
SMOKE
{
  "targetCount": 31,
  "currentTargetPresent": true,
  "skippedBeyondCap": true,
  "promptRolesBeforeLlm": [
    "compactionSummary",
    "user"
  ],
  "compactionSummaryCount": 1,
  "idempotentRoles": [
    "compactionSummary",
    "user"
  ],
  "carryoverSummary": "Capped carryover 29",
  "carryoverTokensBefore": 1029
}

$ npm run test -- src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/session-family-carryover.test.ts
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  82 passed (82)
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  6 passed (6)

$ npm run prompt:snapshots:check
Prompt snapshots are current (7 files).

$ npm run tsgo:test:src
# passed

$ git diff --check
# no output
```

**Observed result after fix:**

- The shared resolver stops before reading the whole 35-ancestor lineage: it returns 31 targets and keeps the current active target.
- Ancestor 30 and later are not read before final history/prompt budgets (`skippedBeyondCap: true`).
- Prompt carryover skips the active current compaction row and selects the latest compaction inside the capped family window, `Capped carryover 29`.
- The installed prompt transform produces exactly one carryover summary immediately before the model boundary: `promptRolesBeforeLlm` is `["compactionSummary", "user"]` and `compactionSummaryCount` is `1`.
- Applying the transform again keeps the same roles, proving the carryover is not duplicated.
- Gateway `chat.history(includeFamily)` has focused coverage for the same cap behavior and still preserves current-session content.

**Implementation safety proof added in this head:**

- Family history reuses `resolveSessionTranscriptResetArchiveCandidatesAsync`, the existing bounded/cached/header-checked reset archive resolver.
- The family target cap is enforced in `resolveSessionFamilyTranscriptReadTargets`, so it applies to both Gateway `chat.history(includeFamily)` and embedded prompt carryover before transcript reads begin.
- The cap reserves room for current-session targets so long ancestor lineages do not hide current context.

**What was not tested:** Full end-to-end Telegram reset turn against a live gateway was not run locally. The current-head smoke, regressions, and tests exercise the real shared resolver, prompt transform, and embedded carryover path against real on-disk session artifacts.
## Current head addendum: `cda0a9633c`

ClawSweeper findings from the `e5b25e79cb` review are addressed in the current head:

- `resolveSessionFamilyTranscriptReadTargets` now reserves one target slot for the current active transcript when current reset archives exist, so capped ancestor/reset archives cannot displace active post-reset context.
- Embedded `chat.history(includeFamily)` now uses the shared family resolver, so `sessions_history` with `includeFamily`/`resetAncestors` has parity in embedded mode instead of exposing a flag that the embedded gateway ignores.
- Added regression coverage for capped ancestors plus current reset archives and for embedded family history resolving ancestor reset archives.

Validation on `cda0a9633c`:

```text
$ npm run test -- src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts src/agents/tools/embedded-gateway-stub.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/session-family-carryover.test.ts
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  82 passed (82)
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  16 passed (16)

$ npm run prompt:snapshots:check
Prompt snapshots are current (7 files).

$ npm run tsgo:test:src
# passed

$ git diff --check
# no output
```

## Current head addendum: `2b21385981`

ClawSweeper's `b9bfaddd5d` review finding about unbounded prompt carryover reads is addressed in this head:

- `resolveSessionFamilyCarryoverSummary` no longer calls `readTranscriptFileState` for each family target.
- Carryover summary lookup reads only a bounded 512 KiB tail of each candidate transcript, parses complete JSONL rows from that tail, and selects the latest compaction entry from the active transcript branch.
- Current-session active transcript skipping and the shared family target cap are preserved.
- Added regression coverage with a reset archive larger than the tail-read limit; the carryover summary is found from the tail without requiring a full transcript-state load.

Validation on `2b213859815292feed05cb09774b3e9790c10c94`:

```text
$ CI=true node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/session-family-carryover.test.ts
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  7 passed (7)

$ CI=true node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts -t 'chat.history can include reset ancestor transcripts from the session family'
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  1 passed | 40 skipped (41)

$ CI=true node --import tsx scripts/generate-prompt-snapshots.ts --check
Prompt snapshots are current (7 files).

$ CI=true node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.src.json
# passed

$ git diff --check
# no output
```

## Current head addendum: `7254ee062d`

ClawSweeper's `46ad064b1e` review findings are addressed in the current head:

- Gateway `chat.history`, embedded `chat.history`, and reset-family carryover now all route through `src/gateway/session-history-family.ts` for one family target resolver.
- The shared resolver keeps current reset archives and the current active transcript available while capping over-long ancestor lineages before transcript reads.
- The branch no longer carries the stale kitchen-sink probe changes; those behaviors are left to the current base.

Exact-head real behavior proof on `7254ee062dffd5aa1d711963682cfd769e4e097e`:

```text
$ node --import tsx --input-type=module <<'TS'
# Creates temporary on-disk session stores/transcripts with 35 ancestors,
# one current reset archive, and one current active transcript.
# Invokes resolveSessionFamilyTranscriptReadTargets,
# resolveSessionFamilyCarryoverSummary, and the embedded prompt transform
# from the current branch source before deleting the temp files.
TS
{
  "targetCount": 32,
  "firstTargets": [
    "ancestor-proof-00",
    "ancestor-proof-01",
    "ancestor-proof-02"
  ],
  "lastTargets": [
    "ancestor-proof-29",
    "current-proof-session",
    "current-proof-session"
  ],
  "currentArchivePresent": true,
  "currentActiveLast": true,
  "ancestor00Present": true,
  "ancestor29Present": true,
  "ancestor30Present": false,
  "ancestor34Present": false,
  "carryoverSummary": "Exact-head carryover 29",
  "carryoverTokensBefore": 2029,
  "promptRolesBeforeLlm": [
    "compactionSummary",
    "user"
  ],
  "compactionSummaryCount": 1,
  "idempotentRoles": [
    "compactionSummary",
    "user"
  ]
}
```

Observed result after fix:

- The shared resolver returns exactly 32 read targets and keeps both current reset archive and current active transcript inside the cap.
- Ancestors beyond the reserved cap are not read: `ancestor30Present` and `ancestor34Present` are false.
- The current active transcript is ordered last for final history trimming, and the current reset archive remains present.
- Carryover skips the current active compaction row and selects the latest ancestor inside the capped family window, `Exact-head carryover 29`.
- The embedded prompt transform injects exactly one `compactionSummary` before the model boundary and remains idempotent on a second transform pass.

Validation on `7254ee062dffd5aa1d711963682cfd769e4e097e`:

```text
$ CI=true node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts src/agents/tools/embedded-gateway-stub.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/session-family-carryover.test.ts
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  86 passed (86)
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  18 passed (18)

$ CI=true node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run test/scripts/kitchen-sink-rpc-walk.test.ts test/scripts/update-clawtributors.test.ts
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  102 passed (102)

$ CI=true node --import tsx scripts/generate-prompt-snapshots.ts --check
Prompt snapshots are current (7 files).

$ CI=true node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.src.json
# passed

$ git diff --check
# no output
```

```text
# Invokes resolveSessionFamilyTranscriptReadTargets,
# resolveSessionFamilyCarryoverSummary, and the embedded prompt transform
# from the current branch source before deleting the temp files.
TS
{
  "targetCount": 32,
  "firstTargets": [
    "ancestor-proof-00",
    "ancestor-proof-01",
    "ancestor-proof-02"
  ],
  "lastTargets": [
    "ancestor-proof-29",
    "current-proof-session",
    "current-proof-session"
  ],
  "currentArchivePresent": true,
  "currentActiveLast": true,
  "ancestor00Present": true,
  "ancestor29Present": true,
  "ancestor30Present": false,
  "ancestor34Present": false,
  "carryoverSummary": "Exact-head carryover 29",
  "carryoverTokensBefore": 2029,
  "promptRolesBeforeLlm": [
    "compactionSummary",
    "user"
  ],
  "compactionSummaryCount": 1,
  "idempotentRoles": [
    "compactionSummary",
    "user"
  ]
}
```

Observed result after fix:

- The shared resolver returns exactly 32 read targets and keeps both current reset archive and current active transcript inside the cap.
- Ancestors beyond the reserved cap are not read: `ancestor30Present` and `ancestor34Present` are false.
- The current active transcript is ordered last for final history trimming, and the current reset archive remains present.
- Carryover skips the current active compaction row and selects the latest ancestor inside the capped family window, `Exact-head carryover 29`.
- The embedded prompt transform injects exactly one `compactionSummary` before the model boundary and remains idempotent on a second transform pass.

Validation on `7254ee062dffd5aa1d711963682cfd769e4e097e`:
